Notes

  • Data was exported from the VL Dashboard for February, March, and mid-April 2026.
  • It was compared against sample tracking records in ResTrack (packages table).
  • All VL Dashboard entries are expected to exist in ResTrack — every VL sample dispatched from a facility should have a corresponding barcode in ResTrack.
  • The reverse is not expected: ResTrack holds broader logistics data beyond VL, so ResTrack records with no VL match are normal and not treated as errors.
  • VL tracking codes were deduplicated per period before matching.
  • Included — VL tracking code found in ResTrack.
  • Exception — VL tracking code with no matching barcode in ResTrack, meaning that sample was not tracked through the logistics system.
